TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Macaran = Gaga mniq Pingtung Mutansyang ka alang Macaran. 193 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 420 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 79% niqan 333 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 21% niqan 87 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 50%, Paiwan 27%, ni rahuq na o 2%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = maʦaɾan = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ mutansjaŋ ka alaŋ maʦaɾan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, paiwan **%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Macaran = Gaga mniq Pingtung Mutansyang ka alang Macaran. 193 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 420 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 79% niqan 333 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 21% niqan 87 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 50%, Paiwan 27%, ni rahuq na o 2%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = maʦaɾan = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ mutansjaŋ ka alaŋ maʦaɾan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, paiwan **%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
